title: Sodium Blockified
description: This project adds jellysquid3's Sodium as blocks and items
body:
# What does "Sodium Blockified" add?
Sodium Blockified adds blocks and items of... SODIUM! I will continue to add more and more until I can't make any more blocks of possible use!
## Credits
I give a load of credit to "jellysquid3" for use of name of Sodium and screenshots of the Sodium logo.
## Will there be a lot of items?
Yes, there will be over 10 items in the first 5 releases (well, that's what I hope!)
